errors.not_in_thread: ⛔ This command must be executed inside an active ModMail thread.
errors.no_active_thread: ⛔ No active ModMail thread detected in this channel.
errors.thread_already_closed: ⛔ This ModMail thread has already been closed.
errors.thread_no_longer_active: ⛔ This ModMail session is no longer active.
errors.session_expired: ⛔ Your session has expired. Please send a new message to start a fresh request.
errors.menu_not_for_you: ⛔ This interaction menu is not associated with your session.
errors.staff_channel_not_found: ❌ Staff workspace not found. Please try again later.
errors.already_pending: ⏳ You already have an open ModMail request. Please complete the selection steps above.
errors.already_claimed: ⛔ This thread is already handled by <@{userId}>.
errors.cannot_transfer_bot: ⛔ Threads cannot be transferred to bot accounts.
errors.already_owns_thread: ⛔ That staff member is already assigned to this thread.
errors.only_handler_can_transfer: ⛔ Only the current handler or a department manager can transfer this thread.
errors.only_claimer_can_pause: ⛔ Only the assigned handler can pause this conversation.
errors.only_claimer_can_resume: ⛔ Only the assigned handler can resume this conversation.
errors.tag_already_exists: ⛔ Tag `{key}` already exists in the system.
errors.thread_not_claimed: ⚠️ This thread is not assigned yet. Click **Claim** before replying.
errors.only_claimer_can_respond: ⛔ Only <@{userId}> is currently assigned to respond in this thread.
errors.no_closed_thread: ⛔ No archived ModMail thread found here.
errors.only_manager_can_reopen: ⛔ Only department managers can reopen archived threads.
errors.reopen_failed: ⛔ Unable to reopen this thread. Please contact a manager.
errors.no_notes_found: 📭 No internal notes found for this user.

success.chat_paused: ⏸️ Conversation paused. Staff replies will not be forwarded until `/thread start` is executed.
success.chat_resumed: ▶️ Conversation resumed. Messages will now sync with the user again.
success.tag_created: ✅ Tag `{key}` created. Staff can send it using `!tag {key}` in ModMail threads.

dm.language_selected_en:
✅ Language set to English.
Please choose the type of request:
dm.language_selected_ar:
✅ تم اختيار اللغة العربية.
اختر نوع الطلب:
dm.thread_created_en: ✅ Your request has been submitted. A staff member will review it shortly.
dm.thread_created_ar: ✅ تم إرسال طلبك. سيقوم أحد أعضاء الفريق بمراجعته قريبًا.
dm.thread_closed_user: 🔒 Thank you for contacting our team. If you require further assistance, please feel free to send a new message.
dm.staff_claimed: **✋ A staff member has taken ownership of your request and will assist you shortly.**

thread.chat_paused_notice: ⏸️ Conversation paused. Run `/thread start` to resume communication.
thread.thread_locked_notice: 🔒 This ModMail thread has been closed.

embed.tags_list_footer: Use !tag <key> to send a predefined response
